title: Verifying Supplier Bona Fides
alt: Checklist of supplier bona fides verification steps under FMD and GDP

items.label: Authorisation status
items.desc: Confirm WDA, MIA or licence on the regulator's own register

items.label: Identity & registered details
items.desc: Reconcile name, registered and site address vs official records

items.label: Scope of authorisation
items.desc: Check licence covers the dosage forms, activities and territories

items.label: Brokers & traders
items.desc: Confirm broker registration; a broker never takes ownership

items.label: Responsible Person
items.desc: Verify a named RP or RPi is accountable for the activities

items.label: Risk-based re-verification
items.desc: Revalidate periodically; licences can be varied or revoked
